name: HTTP Honeypot
description: Static HTTP decoy package with protocol-aware proxy logging.

files.content:
FROM nginx:1.27-alpine
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
COPY site /usr/share/nginx/html

services:
  honeypot:
    build: .
    container_name: http-honeypot
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:${BACKEND_PORT:-18080}:80"
    volumes:
      - ${HONEYPOT_LOGS_DIR}:/var/log/nginx
      - ${HONEYPOT_DATA_DIR}:/data

Industrial Gateway

Remote monitoring portal online.
